name: Apollo 17
left: Descent stage · ALSEP · LRV rover · flag · plaque: 'Here Man completed his first explorations of the Moon. May the spirit of peace in which we came be reflected in the lives of all mankind.'
fact: The last time humans visited the Moon. Gene Cernan was the last person to walk on its surface. Before climbing the ladder, he said: 'We leave as we came, and God willing, we shall return.' Harrison Schmitt, the only trained geologist on the Moon, collected samples that reshaped our understanding of lunar geology.
capability: First trained geologist on a planetary surface — set the precedent that crewed Mars missions should include scientists, not just pilots.
